name: Proposal Engagement
summary: Scores proposal owners based on whether their submissions were funded and how the community rated them, with optional time weighting to favor recent rounds.
description:
### What it measures
Scores the owners of eligible proposals by combining funding outcome and community rating signals. Both the proposer and any listed team members each receive the full proposal score — scores are not divided across owners.

### How scoring works
- Funded and completed proposals add to the score.
- Unfunded proposals subtract from the score.
- Higher community ratings amplify rewards and soften penalties.
- An optional monthly decay rate gives more weight to proposals from recent rounds.

### Scope and limitations
Only proposals from rounds 31, 36, and 107 are scored because those rounds contain reliable team-member ownership data. Proposals from all other rounds are skipped.

### Data source
No file upload is required. The algorithm reads proposals, users, and reviews directly from the DeepFunding Portal.

### Output files
- A per-user CSV with `user_id` and `proposal_engagement`.
- A JSON details file with per-proposal scoring breakdowns and skip reasons.

inputs.label: Funded Proposal Reward
inputs.description: How strongly funded and completed proposals increase the final score. Set to `0` to disable rewards entirely.

inputs.label: Unfunded Proposal Penalty
inputs.description: How strongly unfunded proposals reduce the final score. Set to `0` to disable penalties entirely.

inputs.label: Lookback Window (Months)
inputs.description: Only proposals created within this many months before the snapshot are scored. Proposals older than this window are ignored entirely.

inputs.label: Monthly Decay Rate (%)
inputs.description: Percentage by which a proposal's contribution is reduced for each month of age. Set to `0` to treat all proposals within the window equally.

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement (CSV)
outputs.description: One row per user with columns: `user_id` and `proposal_engagement`.

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Per-proposal scoring breakdown with intermediate values and skip reasons for each user, useful for auditing results.
